summary: Prompt field added to TriggerPipelineRequest in api-definition.yml (optional, maxLength 1000). PromptSanitizer.sanitize() now called in PipelineApiImpl.triggerPipeline() with null-safe fallback to empty string. Tests verify prompt sanitization (VAL-FIX-001) and backward compatibility when prompt is omitted.

VAL-FIX-001.evidence: api-definition.yml has 'prompt' field with maxLength 1000. PipelineApiImpl calls PromptSanitizer.sanitize(triggerPipelineRequest.prompt ?: ""). Tests 'should pass sanitized prompt to pipeline when prompt contains dangerous content' and 'should default to empty string when prompt is not provided' both pass.

codeQuality.architecture: PromptSanitizer is an object (singleton) in adapter/http/incoming/ - appropriate placement for HTTP-layer concern
codeQuality.testing: Comprehensive tests for sanitization including markdown fences, role prefixes, truncation, and combined dangerous content. Backward-compat test included.
